description.p: VidCom (short for Video Compression) is a simple utility for compressing video. It offers both GUI and CLI interface and utilises ffmpeg for the video encoding.
VidCom features two modes; Archive mode and Compress mode:

ul.li: Archive mode compresses a video as much as possible without losing target image quality.
Compress mode compresses a video to a specified target size.

description.p: There are also other options for quick setup, such as reducing resolution and frame rate, choosing an output directory and a trimming function. More advanced users (and anyone else) can set the codec used for encoding and tweak some parameters of chosen codec to trade time for better compression and vice versa.
You can process as many videos as you want by adding them to a queue (GUI) or specifying their paths in the command (CLI).
Whether you want your memories to take up less space or just share a funny video clip with your friends, this app makes it easy for you.

ul.li: Archiving videos
Compressing videos to target sizes
Simple and clean GTK4 + Adwaita user interface
CLI for automation
Uses ffmpeg for encoding
Avaiable codecs are AV1, HEVC, VP9
Written in C++
Fixed a bug where the "Open video" button on the results page wouldn't show a video if the original video wasn't `.mp4`
Fixed the HEVC preset parameter description
When importing videos, runner bar's status changes and shows progress on importing
The program now doesn't regenerate thumbnails if they already exist in cache
Fixed the progress bar in runner sometimes showing more than 100 %
Limits in Cut Feature should now be set properly
Safety mechanism agains a possible rare bug that stopped updating some options
Fixed a crash when the program tried to create a folder inside a directory without write privileges. Now it shows a dialog and stops encoding
Added a notification when encoding is finished. Window should not grab focus when the results page is shown
Fixes for CLI: Ctrl+C should now work properly, missing newline after finishing encoding and report when folder failed to be created
Fixed warnings shown after closing the window; now the popovers are unlinked properly

Now it is possible to cut all videos at once with Cut Feature. The end time is set according to the duration of the shortest clip. This can be useful for encoding for example only the first ten second of each video
Implemented batch settings of codec parameters
